have heq: ZMod.val ((2 : F p) ^ n) = 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_pow]
      rw [ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt]
      · simp_all
        exact Fact.out
      convert two_exp_n_small
      rw [ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt]
      simp_all
      exact Fact.out

    have hdiff_lt_basic : ZMod.val (input.1 + 2^n - (input.2 + 1)) < 2^(n+1) := by
      rw[ZMod.val_sub]
      · rw[ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp only [heq] at *
          have : (input.2 + 1).val = input.2.val + 1 := by
            rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp; linarith
          rw [this]
          calc
            input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
            _ = 2^(n + 1) := by rw[pow_succ, mul_two]
        · have easy_lemma: 2 * 2^n = 2^(n + 1) := by
            rw[pow_succ, two_mul]
            omega
          omega
      · rw[ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp only [heq] at *
          have : (input.2 + 1).val = input.2.val + 1 := by
            rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]; simp; linarith
          rw [this]
          omega
        · have easy_lemma: 2 * 2^n = 2^(n + 1) := by
            rw[pow_succ, two_mul]
            omega
          omega

    have h2 := h_env.right
    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
    · simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hdiff_lt_basic
    · exact h2

end LessEqThan

        specialize h_n2b_sound (by simp [h_input, hy, ZMod.val_add_of_lt hy, ZMod.val_one]) h_n2b_assum h_n2b_main
